'''yadaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smalahove|smalahove]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-d-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smalahove|smalahove]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yadaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yædæjæth|yædæjæth]] || [[word:yædæjæj|yædæjæj]] || [[word:yædæjæsh|yædæjæsh]] || [[word:yædæjæ|yædæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadadajath|yadadajath]] || [[word:yadadajaj|yadadajaj]] || [[word:yadadajash|yadadajash]] || [[word:yadadaja|yadadaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadajath|yadajath]] || [[word:yadajaj|yadajaj]] || [[word:yadajash|yadajash]] || [[word:yadaja|yadaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadafjath|yadafjath]] || [[word:yadafjaj|yadafjaj]] || [[word:yadafjash|yadafjash]] || [[word:yadafjaf|yadafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yadajatha|yadajatha]] || [[word:yadajaja|yadajaja]] || [[word:yadajasha|yadajasha]] || [[word:yadajaka|yadajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yadajath|yadajath]] || [[word:yadajaj|yadajaj]] || [[word:yadajash|yadajash]] || [[word:yadaja|yadaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yadajathal|yadajathal]] || [[word:yadajajal|yadajajal]] || [[word:yadajashal|yadajashal]] || [[word:yadajakal|yadajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yadajathatha|yadajathatha]] || [[word:yadajajaja|yadajajaja]] || [[word:yadajashasha|yadajashasha]] || [[word:yadajaka|yadajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yadajathan|yadajathan]] || [[word:yadajajan|yadajajan]] || [[word:yadajashan|yadajashan]] || [[word:yadajakan|yadajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yadajathaoro|yadajathaoro]] || [[word:yadajajaoro|yadajajaoro]] || [[word:yadajashaoro|yadajashaoro]] || [[word:yadajakaoro|yadajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
